document.title: 1320 S0 Void Gate Content Asset Database v2 EN
document.module: S0 Void Gate / 空性之门
document.purpose: Standalone S0 Void Gate content asset database for NOVA lookup and Awareness Layer report rendering.

positioning.module_function: S0 Void Gate reflects the core illusion, void threshold, or inner misidentification the user is invited to observe and integrate.
positioning.important_boundary: S0 is not a fate gate, karmic sentence, fixed flaw, prediction, diagnosis, or spiritual status. It is a symbolic mirror for awareness.

calculation_dependency.zero_rule: Keep 0 as S0-00. Do not convert to S0-20.

nova_rendering_rule.lookup_behavior: NOVA calculates S0, looks up the matching S0-XX entry, and renders the approved fields.
allowed_generation: Short bridge sentence from Positioning Disclaimer to S0 section.
Brief integration summary using retrieved content only.
must_not_generate: Do not create a new S0 meaning from scratch.
Do not call S0 a destiny, curse, karmic punishment, diagnosis, or fixed identity.
Do not tell the user what major life decision to make based on S0.

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.core_illusion_zh: 一切都必须从外界获得。
content.void_challenge_zh: 无法停下来，持续寻求确认。
content.void_power_zh: 完全回到内在中心的能力。
content.path_of_return_zh: 稳定存在，练习“什么也不做”。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你越是放下，越靠近真相。
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: 一切都必须从外界获得。 It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 稳定存在，练习“什么也不做”。
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.core_illusion_zh: 觉得自己不够好，不够有价值。
content.void_challenge_zh: 自我价值依赖外部评价。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你本来就足够，不需被证明。
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: 觉得自己不够好，不够有价值。 It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 练习不证明自己。
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Void Gate

content.core_illusion_zh: 你相信他人的眼光比自己的真实更重要。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 别人的声音不是你的真相。

content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 停止向外询问“我好吗”。

content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 痛苦来自误认，不来自他人。

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.core_illusion_zh: “我不值得”、“我不够好”。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你否定的是幻象，不是真实的你。

content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 用觉知看见自己的光。

content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 努力不是力量，真实才是。
